dag_desc: Smallest meaningful DAG. An init node writes a ratification receipt; a build node consumes that receipt and produces hello.txt; a terminal node consumes hello.txt. Ordering is expressed entirely via consumes and produces.

tasks.desc: Write a ratification receipt that downstream nodes consume as their start gate.
Produce hello.txt once the init ratification receipt is on disk.
Terminal node that asserts the build artifact is present and the DAG has converged.
